description: Union Industrial Washing (Private) Limited Vs. The Minister of Industries, and Others before Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
parties: Union Industrial Washing (Private) Limited Vs. The Minister of Industries, and Others
judgement_by: Hon. Dr. D. F. H. Gunawardhana, J.
keywords: The Petitioner is an industrialist who was given a parcel of land in the Noorani Industrial Park under the purview of BOI to invest and develop the land and to carry on the business of the relevant industry for the purpose of achieving the objectives of the Industrial Promotion Act. The land so given under a long-term lease under the State Lands Ordinance. However, since 2013, the Petitioner ceased to operate the industry, and from 2016, with permission, had sub- leased the premises to the 8th Respondent for a higher rental; making a profit out of the sub-lease. Thereupon, the 4th to 6th Respondents decided to cancel the lease. The Petitioner challenged this decision in this Application; unsuccessful, due to non-fulfilment of the conditions in the lease
legistation: The Constitution of the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka
